title: General AI Path
description: Build fluency in General AI inside AI Types by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: ARC-AGI (reasoning eval)
steps.summary: ** ARC-AGI (reasoning eval) belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Start after System 2 Reasoning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Artificial Superintelligence (ASI)
steps.summary: ** Artificial Superintelligence (ASI) belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Start after Superintelligence.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Artificial General Intelligence (AGI)
steps.summary: ** Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Start after Artificial General Intelligence.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Strong AI
steps.summary: Strong AI belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into Strong AI vs. Weak AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: AI Superintelligence
steps.summary: AI Superintelligence belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Start after Superintelligence and AI in Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Strong AI vs. Weak AI
steps.summary: Strong AI vs. Weak AI belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Start after Strong AI and Weak AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Superintelligence
steps.summary: Superintelligence belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Compare it with AI Superintelligence and Artificial Superintelligence (ASI). It opens into AI Superintelligence and Artificial Superintelligence (ASI).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Artificial General Intelligence
steps.summary: Artificial General Intelligence belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within General AI. It sits inside AI Types / General AI. Compare it with Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) and Artificial Superintelligence (ASI). It opens into Artificial General Intelligence (AGI).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
